title: Getting Started with autoharp
text: Suppose assign students following problem: Write function rf(n) generates n random variates density \(f(x) = 4x^3\), \(0 < x < 1\). Use inverse transform method. create vector X 10,000 variates using rf().

title: Getting Started with autoharp
text: Create solution_template.Rmd:
code: --- title: "Solution Template" output: html_document ---   ``` r # Reference solution: saved as .rf in the solution environment rf <- function(n) {   u <- runif(n)   u^(1/4)  # inverse CDF of f(x) = 4x^3 } ```   ``` r set.seed(2022) X <- rf(10000)  # saved as .X ```   ``` r # Each line produces TRUE/FALSE: these become the student's test results length(formals(rf)) == 1          # rf has exactly 1 argument length(X) == 10000                # X has 10,000 elements abs(mean(X) - 0.8) < 0.02        # Mean close to 0.8 (theoretical: 0.8) abs(sd(X) - 0.1633) < 0.02       # SD close to 0.163 (theoretical) ```

title: autoharp 0.2.0
text: CRAN release: 2026-02-19 render_prechecks updated look system system2. Uses purl detect chunks better. lintr lines matched purl lines one time. subtree_at() made robust improving get_recursive_index(). extract_actual_args allows ignoring assigned objects. Added ForestHarp helpers count loops, detect possible improvements pipe apply.
